news.t: Biotech Investors Are Tuning Out the MAHA Chaos
Trump to announce discount drug pricing expansion, White House official says
Could pressure to make money faster kill the next lifesaving pill?
Britain agrees full text of US-UK pharmaceutical trade deal
Ozempic—and 14 other popular prescription drugs—will cost less for Medicare after the U.S. government negotiated lower prices
Big Pharma Unfazed by Trump Tariffs, But Small Biotechs Face Vulnerability
Pharma stocks gain, as Trump's tariff move actually could be a win for the sector
Trump teases targeted tariffs on overseas drug manufacturers

holdings.infoBox: PJP is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are AbbVie stock at 5.30%, Eli Lilly and Company at 5.28%, Amgen at 5.25%, Johnson & Johnson at 5.19%, and Abbott Laboratories at 5.05%.

overview.description: The Invesco Pharmaceuticals ETF (PJP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund tracks an index of US pharmaceutical companies selected and weighted based on various factors using a quantitative methodology. PJP was launched on Jun 23, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Biotech Investors Are Tuning Out the MAHA Chaos
data.text: The Food and Drug Administration is still in turmoil, but Wall Street no longer cares.

data.title: Trump to announce discount drug pricing expansion, White House official says
data.text: U.S. President Donald Trump will ‌announce a dramatic expansion of TrumpRx.gov, a government-backed website offering discounted prescription drugs under his ​administration's pricing deal, on Monday, ...

data.title: Could pressure to make money faster kill the next lifesaving pill?
data.text: When activist investors take a stake in a pharmaceutical company, markets often cheer. The expectation is leaner operations, sharper strategy and higher stock prices.

data.title: Britain agrees full text of US-UK pharmaceutical trade deal
data.text: Britain said on Thursday it ​had agreed the ‌full text of a U.S.-UK pharmaceutical partnership, ​setting out terms ​under which British-made medicines ⁠would enter the ​United States tariff-free.

data.title: Ozempic—and 14 other popular prescription drugs—will cost less for Medicare after the U.S. government negotiated lower prices
data.text: The price cuts will save Medicare billions of dollars in prescription-drug spending.

data.title: Big Pharma Unfazed by Trump Tariffs, But Small Biotechs Face Vulnerability
data.text: Drugmakers have been bracing for levies and sought to get ahead of them with pledges to invest billions more on domestic manufacturing.

data.title: Pharma stocks gain, as Trump's tariff move actually could be a win for the sector
data.text: Pharmaceutical stocks mostly gained Friday, as traders appeared to shrug off or even cheer President Donald Trump's rollout of a new tariff plan for drugmakers.

data.title: Trump teases targeted tariffs on overseas drug manufacturers
data.text: With the next set of White House–imposed tariffs just hours away from taking effect — including the attention-hogging 104% rate to be levied on products from China as they're imported into the U.S. — ...

data.title: Best Pharmaceutical ETFs for Q4 2020
data.text: The best pharmaceutical ETFs for Q4 2020 are KURE, XPH, and PJP.
